text: There is one chart on the page.
Is there a total at the bottom?
David, here is my report. There is one main chart on the first page.
Great, Maisa. What does the chart show?
There are three columns here: January, February, and March.
I see. And how many rows are there?
There are five rows, one for each client. Is there a total at the bottom?
Yes, there is. The total is right here.
Perfect. There is one figure I do not understand on page two.
No problem. Let me check the data with you.
There is one chart on the first page.
There are three columns in the table.
There is one figure I do not understand.

Hi Maisa, this is David. Let me describe my report to you. On the first page, there is one big chart. There are three columns in the chart: one for January, one for February, and one for March. There are also five rows, one for each client. At the bottom of the table, there is a total. On page two, there is one more figure and a small note. All the data is correct. Please check it and tell me what you think. Thank you!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. I want to tell you about the report on my screen. There is a table with a lot of data. There are four columns: the name, the date, the price, and the total. There are six rows in the table. On the right side, there is a small chart with three bars. There is one total at the bottom of the page. If there is a figure you do not understand, please ask me. I am happy to explain the data. Have a great day!
Good morning, David. Here is my report. There is one main chart on the first page. There are three columns for the numbers. Is there a total at the bottom? Thank you very much.
There is one chart on the first page.
There are three columns in the table.
There are five rows, one for each client.
Is there a total at the bottom?
There is one figure I do not understand.
